cover.hook_detail: Growing at +14.6% YoY — fastest pace in 2 years

insights.body: From ₹0.9L Cr to ₹4.0L Cr in 24 months. Credit grew 4x — not just gold prices rising.
insights.lender_note: MSME gold-backed products are the highest-velocity play right now.

insights.stat_sublabel: Small business credit tripled its growth rate
insights.body: Micro & Small grew just +9.6% a year ago. Now +31.2%. Added ₹2.45L Cr in one year — vs ₹0.69L Cr before.
insights.lender_note: First-time MSME borrowers are the next frontier.

gaps.body: Shipping shows ₹0.1L Cr — down from ₹7.3L Cr. Not a credit collapse. A reclassification. The ₹7L Cr was relabelled.
gaps.lender_note: Sharp single-period drops in RBI sectoral data = reporting change flag, not a signal.

opportunities.stat_sublabel: Engineering credit: a policy-backed capex cycle
opportunities.body: All Engineering grew +60% in 2 years, PLI-driven. Supply chains — verifiable via GST and TReDS — are underserved.
opportunities.lender_note: PLI-linked engineering supply chains are identifiable and creditworthy.
